title: Sharpe's Vanilla #
description: An overhauled vanilla + experience that adds modern features and optimizations from various mods, resource packs, data packs, and shaders. This pack enhances the original Minecraft feel with missing mechanics and updated graphics.
body:
![Vanilla# Update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f38149089de359d1da7161af4567130a852df9b4.png)
# Description
An overhauled vanilla + experience that adds modern features and optimizations from various mods, resource packs, data packs, and shaders. This pack enhances the original Minecraft feel with missing mechanics and updated graphics.

- Accurate Block Placement Reborn
- Ambient Fireflies
- Apple Skin
